'''Nilz Yomm''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Doctor/Legends|doctor]] from [[Roon/Legends|Roon]], father of [[Auren Yomm Baobab|Auren Yomm]] and husband of [[Bola Yomm]]. When Auren won the [[Roon Colonial Games]], [[Governor/Legends|Governor]] [[Bisad Koong|Koong]], the Governor of Roon, poisoned the province they lived in, [[Umboo]] with a chemical called [[Rooze Disease|rooze]]. Bola was poisoned but Koong accidentally poisoned himself. Nilz was called by Koong, but decided to heal Bola first. Unfortunately, he was unable to heal Koong in time, and Koong died.

==Behind the scenes==
Nilz Yomm was voiced by [[Peter MacNeill]].
